title: scabiosa columbaria var. alpestris
intro: Scabiosa columbaria var. alpestris, also known as Alpine Pincushion, is a flowering plant species in the honeysuckle family, characterized by its delicate, pink or purple flowers and slender stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Scabiosa columbaria var. alpestris include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
